displayTitle: Episode III: Revenge of the Sith Photo Comic
synopsis: Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith is the official comic book adaptation of the film Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith. Unusual for a comic series, the trade paperback and first issue were released simultaneously on April 2, 2005 as part of the film's media launch, and the three remaining issues were released weekly starting on April 13.
title: Episode III: Revenge of the Sith Photo Comic
